content: Self-Refine's iterative self-feedback framework for raw output refinement can be enhanced by integrating LLM self-reflection mechanisms that leverage inconsistent multiple perspectives, creating a two-layer self-improvement pipeline where the outer loop iteratively polishes outputs and the inner reflection step injects diverse critical viewpoints to break out of local optimization traps. This hybrid design retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data, while addressing its common limitation of getting stuck in repetitive, incremental tweaks that fail to fix fundamental flaws.
